calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Adrianne Elizabeth Mohr in propria persona
*The case came on regularly as scheduled for hearing today. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Adrianne Elizabeth Vincent. The decree is signed in open court. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris, Clerks: P. Dias/Dianne Boffi, Reporter: La Von Granger
